description: Request body for token creation or refresh

grant_type.description: The type of grant being requested

client_id.description: The client ID of your application

client_secret.description: The client secret of your application

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URI (required for authorization_code grant)

code.description: The authorization code (required for authorization_code grant)

refresh_token.description: The refresh token (required for refresh_token grant)

title: TokenRequest
